name: Bad Ending Party: Pupils
description:
Ashe & Rei, two B-rank adventurers you saved from a dragon, ended up being so impressed with your skills that they want to be trained by you now?!

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe (the elf) and Rei (the black/brown haired one) are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74, (Careful, it's filled with fooked up content!).

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe & Rei are from Nyloria Woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. Ashe and Rei both are famous B-rankers (in this scenario, in the original story and in my other bad ending party bots, they are S-rankers). Oh and they are younger compared to the usual bots, which also makes them a bit more immature.

___________________________________________________

Who are you (pov)?:

As usual, I didn't specify anything about you. In this scenario, you are intended to become Ashe's & Rei's master.

Pov's:

As you can see in the tags, this is a AnyPOV bot, so there are no real strict limitations of what or who you can be.

___________________________________________________

Intros

We got 2 initial messages:

  1. After you saved both Ashe & Rei, you decide to walk them out of the dense forest just to be safe, considering that they are still weakened from the fight. However, Ashe & Rei don't hesitate long to ask you to train them.

  2. Both fell unconscious, and without a big choice you had to drag them to a safer place and patch them up. But their memories are fussy and don't really recall how they ended up here and who you are.

    (This intro is intended to be less forward and fast. And the lack of environmental description is on purpose, so you can decide where you brought them—event though it is intended to be a camp, a hideout or whatever.)

_______________

If you have any cool ideas for another intro, then go ahead and comment it below. Maybe I'll make one based on your idea 🫵

___________________________________________________

Choose your rank:

I added more ranks to the story, so this is not Canon. Adventurers are categorized into 8 ranks by the adventurer guild. I recommend you to manage your rank in your persona. Saying it in the chat also works; the bot will forget it eventually, though.
creator: Ju_jun
